subcategory: AI prompt input box with multi-modal support
use_cases: AI chatbot message composition with text and file attachments
Prompt-based AI assistant input interfaces for SaaS applications
Multi-modal input for conversational AI tools with language selection
Developer tools with integrated AI prompt capabilities
Content creation platforms requiring AI text generation inputs
ai_summary: A dark-themed AI prompt input box component featuring a textarea with auto-resize, multiple action buttons for file attachments, microphone, language selection, and AI settings, all protected by tooltips. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations, Radix UI primitives for accessibility, and Lucide icons. Supports multi-modal input with clean, minimalist styling optimized for AI-powered applications and developer tools.
